benefits.description: Healing nerve injury in hands and post-surgical soft tissue/ligament recovery. Body felt less stressed and able to recover on its own.
Energy return after several months of use
Looks a couple years younger after a few months
Visible anti-aging effects after few months on GHK-Cu

side_effects.description: Acne takes longer to heal on GH secretagogues

protocol_notes: Started BPC/TB 2.5 months post total hysterectomy, GH secretagogues 3 months post-op. Trans person. Used peptides primarily for nerve injury healing in hands before surgery. Notes that soft tissue is mostly healed in acute sense after stitches dissolve (~6 months), but internal stitches take longer and ligament reattachments benefit from peptides. Takes GHK-Cu 2mg daily subcutaneously.
